The Complete Guide to Answer Engine Optimization

Answer engine optimization is the practice of structuring your content so that AI-powered answer engines can read, understand, and cite it. This guide walks through the core dimensions in practical detail so that you can apply them today across your own site and measure the impact over time.

What is answer engine optimization?

Answer engine optimization means preparing on-page content so machines can extract facts and passages. It differs from classic SEO because the audience is an AI model rather than a ranked list of blue links that a human scans.

Why does crawler access matter?

If AI crawlers are blocked at the robots.txt layer, none of your other optimizations matter because the content is never ingested in the first place. Access is the gate that everything else depends upon.

Which bots should you allow?

Allow reputable AI crawlers such as GPTBot, ClaudeBot, and PerplexityBot unless you have a specific reason to exclude them from your content.

How to structure content for extraction

  1. Use one clear h1 per page.
  2. Follow a logical heading hierarchy.
  3. Lead each section with a direct answer.
